papers.title_en: PAST-TIDE: Prototype-Anchored Statement Tuning with Topic-Invariant Normalization for Stance Detection
papers.authors: Md. Shakhoyat Rahman Shujon, MD Jahid Hasan Jim, Md. Milon Islam, Md Rezwanul Haque, Fakhri Karray
papers.evidence: 用于立场检测的陈述微调和动词化映射
papers.tldr: 本文提出PAST-TIDE系统，旨在解决NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026中的阿拉伯语立场检测任务。该方法通过声明微调将立场检测重定义为完形填空任务，并引入原型对比学习和主题条件层归一化，以增强模型在低资源和跨主题场景下的表现。实验表明，该系统在两个子任务中均取得了优异的宏F1分数，证明了轻量级架构改进在预训练模型中的有效性。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce PAST-TIDE, our stance detection system addressing both subtasks of the StanceNakba Shared Task at NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026. The main idea is statement tuning. We redefine stance as cloze-style masked language modeling (MLM), letting a verbalizer map label words to stance categories through the pre-trained MLM head rather than appending a randomly initialized classification head. We complement this with prototypical contrastive learning, which uses learnable class prototypes for batch-size independent contrastive training, and topic-conditional layer normalization for cross-topic Arabic stance detection. PAST-TIDE achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.75 for Subtask A and 0.74 for Subtask B on the official leaderboard, indicating that minimal architectural additions to a pre-trained model can remain competitive in low-resource settings.
